title: Automated Alpco Human Insulin ELISA Protocol
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol automates the Alpco Insulin ELISA protocol
steps.instruction: This protocol automates the Alpco Insulin ELISA protocol. The protocol begins by transferring aliquots of samples, standards, and controls. The rest of the protocol can be automated or include manual interventions (for wash steps and off-deck incubations). Please note this protocol is currently being optimized. **Update:** This protocol was updated on September 8, 2022 Explanation of complex parameters below: * **Number of Samples**: Specify the number of samples * **P300 Multi-Channel Mount**: Select which mount the P300 Multi-Channel Pipette is attached to (the Single-Channel Pipette should be attached to the opposite mount)

steps.title: Transfer of 25µL of Standards and...
steps.instruction: Transfer of 25µL of Standards and Controls into column 1 of the Destination Plate(s). Followed by 25µL aliquots of samples into two columns for each column of samples.

steps.title: 100µL of Detection Antibody is added to Destination Plate
steps.instruction: 100µL of Detection Antibody is added to Destination Plate.

steps.title: User is prompted to remove plate...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to remove plate from OT-2 and place on shaker for 1 hour incubation.

steps.title: 100µL of TMB Substrate is added to the Destination Plate
steps.instruction: 100µL of TMB Substrate is added to the Destination Plate.

steps.title: User is prompted to remove plate...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to remove plate from OT-2 and place on shaker for 15 minute incubation.

steps.title: 100µL of Stop Solution is added to the Destination Plate
steps.instruction: 100µL of Stop Solution is added to the Destination Plate.
